doc: Canonical per-trade forensic case files. Single source of truth for trade reasoning/execution/attribution/harvest/regime/catalyst/learning. Built by trade_engine.case_file (projection over existing emitters; not a parallel pipeline).

fill_policy_audit.doc: P4.3/P4.4 observational dry-run audit. applied=false everywhere. No live influence. Scorecard/telemetry are dashboards, not control inputs. open_origin is INFERRED (not executor-tagged).

anomalies.note: flag-only; never corrective; never influences governor output

readiness.note: AUDIT DASHBOARD ONLY — never feeds policy/governor/executor/risk

backers.rationale: Risk-on regime supports cyclical exposure.

move_attribution.method: alignment-weighted deterministic decomposition; causation flag = factor references this ticker; not a causal proof

latency.reason: order records store a single timestamp; no submit→ack→fill pair is persisted

_deprecated.reason: Phase-3 split; legacy fields retained byte-identical for compatibility with move_attribution; NOT a policy candidate. Observational marker only — no routing/aliasing.

notes: unfilled order(s) present alongside 20 cohort broker error(s) (e.g. limit-price rejections); cause not per-ticker attributable (broker errors lack symbols)

loop_state.interpretation: 1 driving agent(s); authority CHANGED — SYNTH now FROZEN (no new opens). future behavior altered by the learning loop

dissenters.rationale: Fresh stack break: 20d momentum -10.4%, price just crossed below SMA-200 — trend regime ended.
